title: Hardcore Revive
description: This Mod/Datapack lets you revive your friends of when they die in hardcore
body:
# Hardcore Revive
this datapack lets you revive your friends that died in hardcore without having to start over
## requirement for revive
to revive someone/multiple people (anyone who died and still online when reviving) you need to throw a **nether star and a totem** at the ground.
## how to know if someone got revived
you see a text above your xp bar that says something like this **"(playername1,playername2) has been revived"**
## where to find the revived players
go to spawn and there youll find the person you revived i mean obviously
